name: Komering
notes: Komering (Kumoring) — Lampungic (Malayo-Polynesian) language of South Sumatra, Indonesia; written today in the Latin script (historically in the Lampung/Kaganga abugida). THE GRAPHEME INVENTORY IS NOT YET SPECIFIED here (graphemes/allophones are empty): there is no widely published, citable letter→IPA table and no standardised orthography, and Wikidata records no writing system for this item. Wikidata gives no ISO 639-3 or Glottolog code for this Wikimedia code; Komering is often treated as a dialect of Lampung Api (ljp).

ancestors.notes: Austronesian — the classification node this language sits under.
